exam_price_notes: ~$20–35 USD; often taken alongside HSK 1 or HSK 2

testing_centers.provider: Confucius Institutes and Authorised HSK Test Centres (worldwide)

id_requirements: Valid government-issued photo ID required (passport recommended for international candidates). Registration name must exactly match the ID presented on test day.
exam_rules: Available in both paper-based (PBT) and internet-based (IBT) formats. No dictionaries, notes, or electronic devices permitted during the written exam. HSKK is computer-based with audio recording; candidates speak into a microphone. Candidates must arrive at least 15 minutes before the scheduled start time.

prerequisites.description: None; designed for beginners with basic spoken Chinese

retake_policy.notes: No mandatory waiting period between HSK attempts. Candidates may register for multiple test dates throughout the year. HSK is offered monthly or bi-monthly at many authorised centres.

official_study_resources.title: HSK Official Vocabulary Lists (各级词汇表)

aliases: hskk beginner 初级口语考试
